sm: The single typed unit (declared purpose, authority, effects, reads/writes, budget, evidence) that every one of the eleven kernel engines reads — Axiom's stable semantic unit.

ld: The eleven engines (ADR-067) already exist; Axiom's job is the missing type-lock that composes them, not new vocabulary.
pr: thought we'd spec a greenfield language → it's a composition layer over built engines
im: Axiom v0 = shared capability/effect/intent types wired into the kernel.

q: Wire canvas_protocol::Capability into kernel/Cargo.toml and replace the string-check policy stub with enum+scope+revocation evaluation?
w: ARCH-02 stranded trust is the literal language-shaped gap; nothing in Axiom composes until the capability type is un-stranded.

stmt: Axiom's safety core is decidable: verification reduces to enum membership + capability-lattice subset check + interval arithmetic, so the verifier runs on commodity/edge hardware.
fx: a soundness proof requires undecidable analysis (e.g. unbounded aliasing) in the safety path

s: AI emits bounded params; Rust clamps
sm: Already-shipping proof of Axiom's thesis in the motion domain: AI emits constrained parameters only, Rust motion-core integrates+clamps. Axiom generalizes this to every effect class.

rec: Adopt an MLIR-style multi-dialect Axiom Core IR so one authored intent lowers to a CPU binary, an AOC analog circuit, or a quantum-inspired optimizer — deterministic authority plane unchanged, only the lowering target varies.
fx: no substrate beyond binary (AOC/quantum) becomes physically reachable to our users within 24mo, making multi-dialect lowering dead weight

s: MSR Analog Optical Computer, continuous+binary data, ~100x
mech: AOC runs inference/optimization on commodity room-temp optics; Axiom targets it as an MLIR dialect behind the Black-Box Reduction Envelope
lev: democratizes post-binary compute (quantum needs cryo+capital; AOC is commodity)
rk: treating AOC as root-of-trust instead of bounded advisor

rec: Ship Axiom capsules as signed, content-addressed (Unison-style hash), capability-attenuated components over the existing mutual-auth IPC; receiver admission verifier checks manifest+signature+capability envelope before run.
fx: peer-to-peer capsule exchange never becomes a product surface (all distribution stays server-mediated)

s: Cohen et al. EMNLP 2025; human intent agreement 76-80%
sm: Typed record of competing candidate intents + confidence + evidence-refs; many-valued and paraconsistent by construction (one trajectory has multiple motivations). Decomposed per Cohen et al.: discard speculative_intent before aggregation; infer only from observed summaries.

stmt: Axiom's novel contribution vs WASM-CM/WASI, Unison, MLIR, eBPF is modeling the AI black box as a first-class bounded advisor: probabilistic-above / deterministic-below made into language structure.
fx: any incumbent ships a capability language with first-class bounded-ML-advisor + intent×outcome gating
